# UC-19.1.41 · oVirt / RHV Engine ERROR and SEVERE Log Burst Detection

## Description

The oVirt Engine is the control plane for RHV. Bursts of ERROR/SEVERE lines usually precede UI outages, stuck jobs, or database connectivity loss. Surfacing the dominant message text speeds triage compared to raw log tailing.

## Value

Shortens MTTR for virtualization control-plane incidents by quantifying which engine fault signature is dominating the cluster.

## Implementation

Use a dedicated LINE_BREAKER for multiline Java stack traces or ingest via a syslog relay that preserves severity. Extract `log_level` with transforms. Threshold alerts on rate per hour and on specific signatures (DB, Kerberos, certificate expiry).

## SPL

```spl
index=virtualization sourcetype="ovirt:engine" earliest=-1h
| search log_level IN ("ERROR", "SEVERE", "FATAL")
| stats count as err_events by host, message
| where err_events>=5
| sort -err_events
```

## Visualization

Timechart (error rate), Table (top messages), Drilldown by correlation_id.

## References

- [Red Hat Virtualization 4 — Logging and Reporting](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_virtualization/4.4/html/log_collector/log_collector)
